title: beta patellaris var. diffusa
intro: Beta patellaris var. diffusa, also known as Gotu Kola, is a perennial plant native to tropical Asia, with its leaves and stems being used for various medicinal and health purposes. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects, which make it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as skin conditions, fever, and infections. The health benefits of Gotu Kola include improved cognitive function, memory enhancement, and wound healing, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Gotu Kola is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is also used in traditional medicine as a topical application for skin conditions and injuries.
